【Sturdy and Chew-Resistant】This dog crate furniture is made of premium particle board and iron pipe, which is stronger and more chewy; It will accompany your dog throughout the growing stages; It's an ideal gift for your dog

summary.text: Customers find the dog crate well-made, sturdy, and easy to assemble with clear instructions. They appreciate its size, providing enough space for medium to large dogs, and its furniture-like appearance that blends well with home decor. Customers consider it worth the money and say it fits perfectly in their homes. The locking mechanism receives mixed reviews.

authors_reviews.title: 100% worth it under the correct circumstances
authors_reviews.text: Honestly, I bought this because I felt terrible watching my puppy trying to maneuver her crate after her spay with her donut on. For reference I have a 55lb Amstaff mix puppy. It is spacious, so spacious I feel if I were to get another dog of a similar size they would both very comfortably fit in the crate with no issues. The color is beautiful. It comes together relatively easily & quickly. It is more of a furniture piece so don’t intend to move this from room to room as it is quite large but it is, I feel like, aesthetic enough to have out in the open. My roommate’s call it my puppy’s ‘apartment’. Now I want to be frank my puppy is relatively well crate trained. If you have an escape artist this wouldn’t likely be a great starting crate as the latch although made of good quality has no secondary lock mechanism, if your pup is relatively persistent they will get the door open 100%. Additionally I would make sure to some degree your pup is also house trained. Although the cage is well built and claims to be water proof for accidents the crate isn’t built in a way to pull it apart actively to get into all the crevices id imagine the urine would get into. BUT, If your dog is crate trained and house broken 100% I would suggest this crate if you want something spacious and comfortable.
authors_reviews.author: Sage

authors_reviews.title: Beautiful and sturdy, worth every penny!
authors_reviews.text: This is absolutely gorgeous, really sturdy and fits my 110 Rottweiler. It’s taller and has a slightly smaller footprint than the collapsible 48” crate but he fits just fine.It looks like an intentional piece of furniture, and elevates the space found. Great quality across the board and I will be getting a second one to replace the wire crate in the bedroom!Putting it together was easy for my husband, slow and steady. The tree door options are great and the doors are very quiet, no need for pads (yet).
authors_reviews.author: ItsJustQ

authors_reviews.title: Safe and Secure fur baby.
authors_reviews.text: My daughters dog is huge and this is an amazing safe space for her fur baby to spend down time. we put it together with ease and it is holding up really well. It keeps our sweet baby safe and secure and offers her the room she need to find comfort when we are not with her. Excellent quality and stability. Did i mention it was big. It is very Big.
authors_reviews.author: Leslie Sutter

authors_reviews.title: Amazing value, 10/10 recommend!
authors_reviews.text: Absolutely an amazing kennel solution! I have the three door option that can be attached to a secondary or tertiary kennel. My 100lb, 26" neck to tail, and 33in foot to back, pittbull mix fits with ample room to stretch out in the XXL.I recommend getting felt sticky pads to dampen the sound of the doors as they can rattle with movement.The top is extremely sturdy and is used for storage of dog essentials. I was also able to attach a small water bowl that is clamped to the bars of the crate.This is absolutely meant to be part of your room furniture and not for travel. It fits really well and blends with any furniture vs a wire crate.
authors_reviews.author: Gerri

authors_reviews.title: Lyromix 48'' XXL Dog Crate Furniture
authors_reviews.text: I recently purchased the Lyromix 48" XXL Dog Crate Furniture, and I could not be happier with my choice! This crate has been a game-changer for both my large dog and me.First off, the spacious interior is perfect for my big-breed dog, offering plenty of room for her to turn around and lie down comfortably. I have noticed that she seems much more at ease than in her previous crate, and that really eases my mind.The sturdiness of this crate is impressive. It feels well-built and durable, which is crucial for a large dog. I have had other crates that did not hold up well over time, but this one gives me confidence that it will last.One of the standout features is its furniture-style design. It seamlessly blends into my living room, looking more like a stylish piece of furniture than a typical dog crate. It even doubles as a TV stand, which is a fantastic space-saving solution.Assembly was a breeze, thanks to the clear instructions and all the tools provided. I had it put together within an hour and a half, and the doors open and close smoothly, making it easy for my dog to enter and exit.Overall, the Lyromix 48'' XXL Dog Crate Furniture is a fantastic product that combines practicality with a touch of elegance. I highly recommend it to any large dog owner looking for comfort, durability, and style!
authors_reviews.author: Dennis V

authors_reviews.title: Stylish and large!
authors_reviews.text: Stylish and great dog kennel. Big enough for a Dane. However, side door latches are either missing from box or come off easily due to cheaply made and get lost. So side doors are unreliable to open or close but that didn’t really affect my personal use. Just a thought if you actually plan on using the side doors. Mine are just stuck permanently closed. It doesn’t bother me.
authors_reviews.author: Aj

authors_reviews.title: Good size for monster pup, well constructed and easy to put together
authors_reviews.text: Arrived on time and easy to put together. It seems of good quality, and our 90# shepherd mix (very chewy) puppy hasn't been able to do any damage. It has three doors, and the lock on each have been easy to use and work well. This crate was a little expensive, but still, good value for the money. So far it still fits our unexpectedly huge puppy in both height and length.
authors_reviews.author: jax

authors_reviews.title: Dog Crates
authors_reviews.text: The crates has held up great. The levels on the bottom were useful to balance on my floors. The latch i had to retighten as it came off but once tightened it has done great. They are made to look really nice and my Dogs love them. Great size to them also.
authors_reviews.author: Derek Phillips
